mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_class_device_report ( session_id, uid, report_stage, camera_status, mic_status, speaker_status, network_level, browser_info, os_info, device_json, create_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{uid}, #{reportStage}, #{cameraStatus}, #{micStatus}, #{speakerStatus}, #{networkLevel}, #{browserInfo}, #{osInfo}, #{deviceJson}, NOW(3) )
